query: UPDATE ai_assessments SET total_loss_indicated = 0, total_loss_reasoning = NULL, estimated_vehicle_value = 245000, repair_to_value_ratio = 11 WHERE claim_id IN (SELECT id FROM claims WHERE vehicle_make IS NULL OR vehicle_make = '') AND total_loss_indicated = 1;
